channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: The Galaxy S23 series and A56 are next in line for Samsung's big One UI 8.5 update - Android Authority
item.description:
1. The Galaxy S23 series and A56 are next in line for Samsung's big One UI 8.5 update  Android Authority
  2. Samsung Launches One UI 9 Beta for Galaxy S26 Series Users  samsung.com
  3. May 18 brings One UI 8.5 update for several Galaxy smartphones  SamMobile
  4. Samsung Warns Galaxy Users—Delete ‘High Risk Apps’  Forbes
  5. One UI 8.5 vs One UI 9: the Biggest Upgrades You Might Miss  Geeky Gadgets

item.title: Claude Code RCE Flaw Lets Attackers Execute Commands via Malicious Deeplinks - CyberSecurityNews
item.description:
1. Claude Code RCE Flaw Lets Attackers Execute Commands via Malicious Deeplinks  CyberSecurityNews
  2. Running Claude Code or Claude in Chrome? Here's the audit matrix for every blind spot your security stack misses  Venturebeat
  3. Anthropic faces scrutiny over Claude's architectural flaws after multiple security disclosures in May 2026  Crypto Briefing
  4. Claude Code MCP Attack Enables Persistent Token Theft  eSecurity Planet
  5. Researchers Disclose Multiple Security Flaws in Anthropic's Claude  Let's Data Science

item.title: Former Microsoft VP says Microsoft missed the AI wave like the internet and mobile, as Copilot scales back in Windows 11 - Windows Latest
item.description:
1. Former Microsoft VP says Microsoft missed the AI wave like the internet and mobile, as Copilot scales back in Windows 11  Windows Latest
  2. What To Do When Your AI’s Guardrails Fail  Information Security Buzz
  3. Xbox winds down Copilot on mobile and halts console plans  NewsBytes
  4. The Copilot pause is a wake-up call for Microsoft 365 security  The AI Journal
  5. Microsoft struggles with user backlash over AI  Texas Standard

item.title: Excel’s Copilot button blocks my data in spreadsheets, but Microsoft won’t let me remove it - Windows Central
item.description: Excel’s Copilot button blocks my data in spreadsheets, but Microsoft won’t let me remove it  Windows CentralSee more headlines & perspectives on Google News

item.title: Until Dawn Dev Still Going with Dark Pictures Series, Next Entry Teased - Push Square
item.description:
1. Until Dawn Dev Still Going with Dark Pictures Series, Next Entry Teased  Push Square
  2. How To Unlock The Next Dark Pictures Teaser In Directive 8020  GameSpot
  3. Directive 8020 Review - A Failed Copy  Game Informer
  4. Seven Horror Subgenres ‘The Dark Pictures’ Should Tackle Next After ‘Directive 8020’  Bloody Disgusting
  5. 'Directive 8020' is an introspective look at sci-fi horror and our fear of the unknown  Space
